series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes the registration application (BMV 4349), the reporting form (BMV 4382), and all temporary tag information entered into the dealer system.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain three years from the date of section transfer to ODPS Record Center. ; Electronic: Retain reported temporary tags in the BMV dealer system for three years from expiration date. Temporary tags issued to a dealer with no record (not reported) retain in the BMV dealer system for three years from the issue date of inventory ., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
